import * as env from "@env"; document.on("click", "button#set", async function(evt,button) { var r = Window.this.trayIcon({ image: await Graphics.Image.load(__DIR__ + "../trayicon.svg"), text: "I am trayIcon\ncreated at: " + new Date() }); if( r ) button.state.disabled = true; }); document.on("click", "button#remove", function(evt,button) { var r = Window.this.trayIcon("remove"); if( r ) document.$("button#set").state.disabled = false; }); document.on("click", "button#place", function() { var [x,y,w,h] = Window.this.trayIcon("place"); document.$("span#place").innerText = `x:${x},y:${y},w:${w},h:${h}`; }); document.on("click", "button#update", function() { Window.this.trayIcon({ text: "updated at: " + new Date() }); }); document.ready = function() { const ol = document.$("ol#events"); function append(name,details) { ol.append(
  • {name} x:{details.screenX} y:{details.screenY} buttons:{details.buttons}
    • ); if(ol.length > 100) ol.firstElementChild.remove(); } Window.this.on("trayiconclick", evt => { append("trayiconclick",evt.data); let [x,y,w,h] = Window.this.trayIcon("place"); let alignment = 2; console.log(x,y,w,h); if(env.PLATFORM == "OSX") { x = x + w / 2; // window below of x/y y = y + h; alignment = 8; } else { x = x + w / 2; alignment = 2; //window on top of x/y } //var [sx,sy] = Window.this.box("position","client","screen", true); //var menu = document.$("menu#tray"); //const {screenX,screenY} = evt.data; new Window({ type: Window.POPUP_WINDOW, parent: Window.this, url: __DIR__ + "trayicon-popup.htm", state:Window.WINDOW_HIDDEN, x: Length.ppx(x), y: Length.ppx(y), alignment }); }); Window.this.on("trayicondoubleclick", evt => { append("trayicondoubleclick",evt.data); }); } document.on("blur",function(evt) { console.log(evt.target); }); document.on("click", "button#hide", evt => { Window.this.state = Window.WINDOW_HIDDEN; }); Window.this.on("reveal", evt => { Window.this.state = Window.WINDOW_SHOWN; }); Window.this.on("exit", evt => { // exiting the application Window.this.trayIcon("remove"); Window.this.close(); }); Show window Exit

    Note: this also demonstrates popup menu on RIGHT CLICK on tray icon.

    Set Icon
    Remove icon
    Update text Get place:
    Hide window
    trayIcon Events:
